verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus,  quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה כִּי־ט֑וֹב כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicant qui redempti sunt a Domino,  quos redemit de manu inimici,  et de regionibus congregavit eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹ֭אמְרוּ גְּאוּלֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר גְּ֝אָלָ֗ם מִיַּד־צָֽר׃
verses.king_james: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so, whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the enemy;

verses.latin_vulgate: a solis ortu, et occasu, ab aquilone, et mari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּֽמֵאֲרָצ֗וֹת קִ֫בְּצָ֥ם מִמִּזְרָ֥ח וּמִֽמַּעֲרָ֑ב מִצָּפ֥וֹן וּמִיָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east, and from the west, from the north, and from the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erraverunt in solitudine, in inaquoso ;  viam civitatis habitaculi non invenerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּע֣וּ בַ֭מִּדְבָּר בִּישִׁימ֣וֹן דָּ֑רֶךְ עִ֥יר מ֝וֹשָׁ֗ב לֹ֣א מָצָֽאוּ׃
verses.king_james: They wandered in the wilderness in a solitary way; they found no city to dwell in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Esurientes et sitientes,  anima eorum in ipsis defecit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְעֵבִ֥ים גַּם־צְמֵאִ֑ים נַ֝פְשָׁ֗ם בָּהֶ֥ם תִּתְעַטָּֽף׃
verses.king_james: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamaverunt ad Dominum cum tribularentur,  et de necessitatibus eorum eripuit eos ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּצְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הֹוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצ֥וּקוֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses.

verses.latin_vulgate: et deduxit eos in viam rectam,  ut irent in civitatem habitationis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יַּדְרִיכֵם בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ יְשָׁרָ֑ה לָ֝לֶ֗כֶת אֶל־עִ֥יר מוֹשָֽׁב׃
verses.king_james: And he led them forth by the right way, that they might go to a city of habitation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur Domino misericordiæ ejus,  et mirabilia ejus filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְ֝נִפְלְאוֹתָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia satiavit animam inanem,  et animam esurientem satiavit bonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִ֭שְׂבִּיעַ נֶ֣פֶשׁ שֹׁקֵקָ֑ה וְנֶ֥פֶשׁ רְ֝עֵבָ֗ה מִלֵּא־טֽוֹב׃
verses.king_james: For he satisfieth the longing soul, and filleth the hungry soul with goodness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedentes in tenebris et umbra mortis ;  vinctos in mendicitate et ferro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹ֭שְׁבֵי חֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָ֑וֶת אֲסִירֵ֖י עֳנִ֣י וּבַרְזֶֽל׃
verses.king_james: Such as sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron;

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia exacerbaverunt eloquia Dei,  et consilium Altissimi irritaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִמְר֥וּ אִמְרֵי־אֵ֑ל וַעֲצַ֖ת עֶלְי֣וֹן נָאָֽצוּ׃
verses.king_james: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the most High:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et humiliatum est in laboribus cor eorum ;  infirmati sunt, nec fuit qui adjuvaret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּכְנַ֣ע בֶּעָמָ֣ל לִבָּ֑ם כָּ֝שְׁל֗וּ וְאֵ֣ין עֹזֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Therefore he brought down their heart with labour; they fell down, and there was none to help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamaverunt ad Dominum cum tribularentur ;  et de necessitatibus eorum liberavit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הֹוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצֻ֥קוֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יוֹשִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit eos de tenebris et umbra mortis,  et vincula eorum dirupit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: י֭וֹצִיאֵם מֵחֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָ֑וֶת וּמוֹסְר֖וֹתֵיהֶ֣ם יְנַתֵּֽק׃
verses.king_james: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and brake their bands in sunder.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur Domino misericordiæ ejus,  et mirabilia ejus filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְ֝נִפְלְאוֹתָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia contrivit portas æreas,  et vectes ferreos confregit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־שִׁ֭בַּר דַּלְת֣וֹת נְחֹ֑שֶׁת וּבְרִיחֵ֖י בַרְזֶ֣ל גִּדֵּֽעַ׃
verses.king_james: For he hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscepit eos de via iniquitatis eorum ;  propter injustitias enim suas humiliati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֭וִלִים מִדֶּ֣רֶךְ פִּשְׁעָ֑ם וּֽ֝מֵעֲוֺ֥נֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יִתְעַנּֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: Fools because of their transgression, and because of their iniquities, are afflicted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnem escam abominata est anima eorum,  et appropinquaverunt usque ad portas mortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֹ֭כֶל תְּתַעֵ֣ב נַפְשָׁ֑ם וַ֝יַּגִּ֗יעוּ עַד־שַׁ֥עֲרֵי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.king_james: Their soul abhorreth all manner of meat; and they draw near unto the gates of death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamaverunt ad Dominum cum tribularentur,  et de necessitatibus eorum liberavit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הֹוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצֻ֥קוֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יוֹשִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saveth them out of their distresses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit verbum suum, et sanavit eos,  et eripuit eos de interitionibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁלַ֣ח דְּ֭בָרוֹ וְיִרְפָּאֵ֑ם וִ֝ימַלֵּ֗ט מִשְּׁחִֽיתוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: He sent his word, and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur Domino misericordiæ ejus,  et mirabilia ejus filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְ֝נִפְלְאוֹתָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sacrificent sacrificium laudis,  et annuntient opera ejus in exsultatione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭יִזְבְּחוּ זִבְחֵ֣י תוֹדָ֑ה וִיסַפְּר֖וּ מַעֲשָׂ֣יו בְּרִנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And let them sacrifice the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his works with rejoicing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui descendunt mare in navibus,  facientes operationem in aquis multis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ יוֹרְדֵ֣י הַ֭יָּם בׇּאֳנִיּ֑וֹת עֹשֵׂ֥י מְ֝לָאכָ֗ה בְּמַ֣יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters;

verses.latin_vulgate: ipsi viderunt opera Domini,  et mirabilia ejus in profundo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ הֵ֣מָּה רָ֭אוּ מַעֲשֵׂ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְ֝נִפְלְאוֹתָ֗יו בִּמְצוּלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: These see the works of the Lord, and his wonders in the deep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit, et stetit spiritus procellæ,  et exaltati sunt fluctus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ וַיֹּ֗אמֶר וַֽ֭יַּעֲמֵד ר֣וּחַ סְעָרָ֑ה וַתְּרוֹמֵ֥ם גַּלָּֽיו׃
verses.king_james: For he commandeth, and raiseth the stormy wind, which lifteth up the waves thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendunt usque ad cælos, et descendunt usque ad abyssos ;  anima eorum in malis tabescebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ יַעֲל֣וּ שָׁ֭מַיִם יֵרְד֣וּ תְהוֹמ֑וֹת נַ֝פְשָׁ֗ם בְּרָעָ֥ה תִתְמוֹגָֽג׃
verses.king_james: They mount up to the heaven, they go down again to the depths: their soul is melted because of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Turbati sunt, et moti sunt sicut ebrius,  et omnis sapientia eorum devorata est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ יָח֣וֹגּוּ וְ֭יָנוּעוּ כַּשִּׁכּ֑וֹר וְכׇל־חׇ֝כְמָתָ֗ם תִּתְבַּלָּֽע׃
verses.king_james: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et clamaverunt ad Dominum cum tribularentur ;  et de necessitatibus eorum eduxit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ וַיִּצְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הֹוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם וּֽ֝מִמְּצ֥וּקֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יוֹצִיאֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he bringeth them out of their distresses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et statuit procellam ejus in auram,  et siluerunt fluctus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָקֵ֣ם סְ֭עָרָה לִדְמָמָ֑ה וַ֝יֶּחֱשׁ֗וּ גַּלֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: He maketh the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof are still.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et lætati sunt quia siluerunt ;  et deduxit eos in portum voluntatis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׂמְח֥וּ כִֽי־יִשְׁתֹּ֑קוּ וַ֝יַּנְחֵ֗ם אֶל־מְח֥וֹז חֶפְצָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Then are they glad because they be quiet; so he bringeth them unto their desired haven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur Domino misericordiæ ejus,  et mirabilia ejus filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְ֝נִפְלְאוֹתָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exaltent eum in ecclesia plebis,  et in cathedra seniorum laudent eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִֽ֭ירוֹמְמוּהוּ בִּקְהַל־עָ֑ם וּבְמוֹשַׁ֖ב זְקֵנִ֣ים יְהַלְלֽוּהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Let them exalt him also in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the assembly of the elders.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit flumina in desertum,  et exitus aquarum in sitim ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשֵׂ֣ם נְהָר֣וֹת לְמִדְבָּ֑ר וּמֹצָ֥אֵי מַ֝֗יִם לְצִמָּאֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and the watersprings into dry ground;

verses.latin_vulgate: terram fructiferam in salsuginem,  a malitia inhabitantium in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֣רֶץ פְּ֭רִי לִמְלֵחָ֑ה מֵ֝רָעַ֗ת י֣וֹשְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: A fruitful land into barrenness, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit desertum in stagna aquarum,  et terram sine aqua in exitus aquarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשֵׂ֣ם מִ֭דְבָּר לַאֲגַם־מַ֑יִם וְאֶ֥רֶץ צִ֝יָּ֗ה לְמֹצָ֥אֵי מָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: He turneth the wilderness into a standing water, and dry ground into watersprings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et collocavit illic esurientes,  et constituerunt civitatem habitationis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֣וֹשֶׁב שָׁ֣ם רְעֵבִ֑ים וַ֝יְכוֹנְנ֗וּ עִ֣יר מוֹשָֽׁב׃
verses.king_james: And there he maketh the hungry to dwell, that they may prepare a city for habitation;

verses.latin_vulgate: et seminaverunt agros et plantaverunt vineas,  et fecerunt fructum nativitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְרְע֣וּ שָׂ֭דוֹת וַיִּטְּע֣וּ כְרָמִ֑ים וַ֝יַּעֲשׂ֗וּ פְּרִ֣י תְבוּאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And sow the fields, and plant vineyards, which may yield fruits of increase.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et benedixit eis, et multiplicati sunt nimis ;  et jumenta eorum non minoravit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבָרְכֵ֣ם וַיִּרְבּ֣וּ מְאֹ֑ד וּ֝בְהֶמְתָּ֗ם לֹ֣א יַמְעִֽיט׃
verses.king_james: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly; and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pauci facti sunt et vexati sunt,  a tribulatione malorum et dolore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמְעֲט֥וּ וַיָּשֹׁ֑חוּ מֵעֹ֖צֶר רָעָ֣ה וְיָגֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Again, they are minished and brought low through oppression, affliction, and sorrow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Effusa est contemptio super principes :  et errare fecit eos in invio, et non in via.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ׆ שֹׁפֵ֣ךְ בּ֭וּז עַל־נְדִיבִ֑ים וַ֝יַּתְעֵ֗ם בְּתֹ֣הוּ לֹא־דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the wilderness, where there is no way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adjuvit pauperem de inopia,  et posuit sicut oves familias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְשַׂגֵּ֣ב אֶבְי֣וֹן מֵע֑וֹנִי וַיָּ֥שֶׂם כַּ֝צֹּ֗אן מִשְׁפָּחֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Yet setteth he the poor on high from affliction, and maketh him families like a flock.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videbunt recti, et lætabuntur ;  et omnis iniquitas oppilabit os suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְא֣וּ יְשָׁרִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ וְכׇל־עַ֝וְלָ֗ה קָ֣פְצָה פִּֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: The righteous shall see it, and rejoice: and all iniquity shall stop her mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis sapiens, et custodiet hæc,  et intelliget misericordias Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִי־חָכָ֥ם וְיִשְׁמׇר־אֵ֑לֶּה וְ֝יִתְבּוֹנְנ֗וּ חַֽסְדֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Whoso is wise, and will observe these things, even they shall understand the lovingkindness of the Lord.
